title: Association of Four Genetic Variants with Colorectal Cancer in Kazakhstan Population
author: Yevgeniya Kolesnikova
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Study was performed with 282 CRC patients and 159 cancer-free controls living in the Karaganda Region, Kazakhstan. 

 Selection and genotyping of SNPs were made using the Ensembl (https://www.ensembl.org/). We selected 12 candidate SNPs for genotyping panel, which previously reported being associated with CRC. Genotyping of SNPs located on chromosome 10 associated with CRC, were performed by QuantStudio 12K Flex PCR. PCR output was analyzed using an official ThermoFisher application (https://apps.thermofisher.com). Genotypes were determined in a 2-dimensional space - a cluster of homozygous genotypes along the first allele was located near the X axis, and homozygous genotypes along the second allele along Y. A cluster of heterozygous genotypes was formed between them.
steps_raw:

Genotyping of SNPs located on chromosome 10 associated with CRC, were performed by QuantStudio 12K Flex PCR. PCR output was analyzed using an official ThermoFisher application (https://apps.thermofisher.com). Genotypes were determined in a 2-dimensional space - a cluster of homozygous genotypes along the first allele was located near the X axis, and homozygous genotypes along the second allele along Y. A cluster of heterozygous genotypes was formed between them.
keywords: colorectal adenocarcinoma; single nucleotide polymorphisms; rs10795668; rs1035209; rs11190164; rs10506868
